name: serez-ui
description: UI library for Serez-Code — Virtual DOM (event-driven render + frame-skip), JSX translator, Window/State/Effects, TUI + GUI renderers, unified focus + keyboard nav, onFrame() hook for periodic work, clipboard (Ctrl+C/V/X in text fields), hover cursors, 18 built-in components (Button, Input, Textarea, Select, Dropdown, Checkbox, RadioGroup, Slider, ProgressBar, Label, Link, Row/Col, Image, Table, Modal, Tooltip, Toast), responsive layout (autosize + min/max-width, .szs media queries, breakpoint() in render, Row auto-wrap), word-wrap + mouse-wheel scroll, CSS con lógica (.szs)
author: Sergio3215
